name: Yuuma Kunimi
description: A good friend of [Sakuta Azusagawa](https://anilist.co/character/127221/Sakuta-Azusagawa) and [Rio Futaba](https://anilist.co/character/127633/Rio-Futaba), as well as the boyfriend of [Saki Kamisato](https://anilist.co/character/130304). He is a member of Minegahara High's basketball team, being quite athletic and popular within the school.
